docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS-CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 07/07/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2017 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT TO AUG-10-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BONNIE POWELL APPEARED. DEFENDANT FRANK SANCHEZ APPEARED, WAIVES SERVICE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF NOV-01-2017
ORDER CONTINUED TO AUG-10-2017 AT 1:30 IN DEPT 506 TO PROVIDE SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY POWELL, BONNIE SANCHEZ, FRANK
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY POWELL, BONNIE AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, FRANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SAMUEL LAW. PLAINTIFF BONNIE POWELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANK SANCHEZ IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY PAZ PERRY, CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE OF CLAIM JUL-07-17. BOTH PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL LAW; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POWELL, BONNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, FRANK $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, THE $10,000.00 AWARD DOES NOT INCLUDE PAIN & SUFFERING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
